name: Harvest Keep
identity: Granary and bargaining hub where crop security, measure law, and caravan timing matter as much as soil.
approach: Canal-cut fields and raised storehouses gather into a fortified grain town ringed by counting towers.
inside: Granaries, weigh yards, stable courts, produce exchanges, and ration halls crowd together beneath watchful scale-markers.
faith: fertility and renewal observance stay practical and seasonal
seasonal_change: Harvest surges create intense crowding and stricter load control.
